meta.educational_goal: Understand and manipulate deque operations interactively.
expected_interactions: Push and pop elements from both ends of the deque.
Insert and delete elements at specific indices.
Fill the deque with random or ranged values.
Manage history of operations with undo/redo.

events.description: Push values to the front of the deque.
Push values to the back of the deque.
Pop values from the front of the deque.
Pop values from the back of the deque.
Peek the front value of the deque.
Peek the back value of the deque.
Clear all values from the deque.
Insert values at a specified index.
Delete a value at a specified index.
Set a value at a specified index.
Rotate the deque to the left.
Rotate the deque to the right.
Reverse the order of the deque.
Fill the deque with random values.
Fill the deque with a range of values.
Apply a mapping function to the deque.
Apply a filter function to the deque.
Compact the deque by removing null/undefined values.
Begin a transaction for batch operations.
Commit the current transaction.
Rollback the current transaction.
Apply all commands in the batch.
Clear the batch of commands.
Undo the last operation.
Redo the last undone operation.
Run a script of commands.
Step through the script command by command.
Stop the currently running script.
Find a value in the deque.
Highlight all occurrences of a value in the deque.
View the value at a specific index.
Save the current state as a JSON snapshot.
Load a state from a JSON snapshot.
Export the operation log to a text file.
Run a series of random operations on the deque.
Validate the deque against a native array simulation.

actions: restoreSnapshot({arr: state.txBackup.arr, cap: state.txBackup.cap, autoExpand: state.txBackup.autoExpand}, true)

attributes.placeholder: single value, CSV, or JSON array

evidence: <input id="valInput" type="text" class="large" placeholder="single value, CSV, or JSON array">
